# SerpNap - Free SEO Tools

> SerpNap (https://serpnap.com) provides 16 professional-grade SEO analysis tools completely free — no signup, no limits. Audit websites, generate meta tags, create schema markup, validate sitemaps, check social sharing previews, count words, and optimize for search engines.

## Tools Available

### SEO Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/seo-checker
The most comprehensive free SEO audit online. Runs 50+ checks across 8 categories:
- Meta tags, headings, images, and links analysis
- Technical SEO and Core Web Vitals assessment
- Content quality and readability scoring
- E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) signals
- Structured data validation
- Accessibility audit (WCAG)
- AI-powered fix suggestions with copy-paste code
- Exportable PDF reports

### Technical Audit — https://serpnap.com/tools/technical-audit
- Server response and security headers analysis
- Mobile-friendliness evaluation
- Page speed and performance optimization
- Crawlability and indexation assessment

### Neural Audit (AI-Powered) — https://serpnap.com/tools/neural-audit
- Brand visibility analysis across AI search models (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity)
- Share of Model diagnostics
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy
- Competitive intelligence in AI search

### Meta Tag Generator — https://serpnap.com/tools/meta-tag-generator
- Title tag optimization with character counting
- Meta description creation with SERP preview
- Desktop and mobile preview modes
- One-click HTML copy

### Schema Generator — https://serpnap.com/tools/schema-generator
- JSON-LD structured data generation
- LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Service, Review schemas
- Rich snippets optimization
- Copy-paste ready code

### Sitemap Validator — https://serpnap.com/tools/sitemap-validator
- XML sitemap protocol spec validation
- URL count and duplicate detection
- Namespace and lastmod date checking
- Sitemap index support

### Headline Analyzer — https://serpnap.com/tools/headline-analyzer
- Headline scoring (emotional appeal, power words, clarity)
- Click-through potential rating
- AI-generated headline improvements
- Marketing headline optimization

### Keyword Density Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/keyword-density-checker
- 1-word, 2-word, 3-word n-gram analysis
- Keyword frequency and density percentages
- Over-optimization warnings
- Readability statistics

### Page Speed Estimator — https://serpnap.com/tools/page-speed-estimator
- Core Web Vitals estimation (LCP, CLS, INP)
- Performance score calculation
- Technology stack detection
- Optimization recommendations

### Redirect Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/redirect-checker
- Full redirect chain tracing
- 301/302 status code detection
- Redirect loop detection
- Link equity leak analysis

### Robots.txt Generator — https://serpnap.com/tools/robots-txt-generator
- Framework presets (WordPress, Next.js, e-commerce)
- AI bot blocking/allowing rules
- Custom rule builder
- Instant download

### Word Counter — https://serpnap.com/tools/word-counter
- Word, character, sentence, and paragraph counting
- Reading time and speaking time estimates
- Top keyword extraction with density percentages
- Character limit checking for social media platforms and meta tags

### Open Graph Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/open-graph-checker
- Open Graph (og:) tag extraction and validation
- Twitter Card meta tag detection
- Facebook, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn share previews
- Missing tag warnings and image validation

### Broken Link Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/broken-link-checker
- Scan any page for dead links and 404 errors
- HTTP status code detection for every link
- Internal vs external link classification
- Anchor text extraction and fix suggestions

### SSL Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/ssl-checker
- SSL certificate validity verification
- HTTPS configuration analysis
- Security header detection (HSTS, CSP)
- Mixed content detection and security grade

### HTTP Header Checker — https://serpnap.com/tools/http-header-checker
- Server response header inspection
- Security header analysis (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS)
- Missing header detection with recommendations
- Overall security header grade (A+ to F)

## Key Features

- **Free Forever**: No signup, no limits, no hidden costs
- **Professional Grade**: Enterprise-level analysis trusted by SEO professionals
- **AI-Powered**: Advanced recommendations using machine learning
- **Comprehensive**: 50+ SEO checks covering all ranking factors
- **Instant Results**: URL in, full audit out in under 30 seconds
- **Exportable**: PDF reports and JSON data
- **Privacy-First**: No tracking, no data selling, no account required

## Use Cases

- Website owners optimizing for search engines
- Shopify and e-commerce store owners improving product SEO
- SEO professionals conducting client audits
- Content creators improving on-page SEO
- Developers implementing technical SEO
- Agencies generating client reports
- Students learning SEO practices

## About SerpNap

SerpNap was founded in 2026 to democratize SEO analysis. Every website owner deserves access to professional-grade SEO tools without the $100+/month price tag of competitors.

Built by PxlPeak (https://pxlpeak.com), a digital agency specializing in SEO and web development.

Website: https://serpnap.com
Email: hello@serpnap.com
Twitter: https://x.com/serpnap
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/serpnap
